% MTDF CMB Consistency Summary - LaTeX table for paper inclusion
% Generated by CLASS validation pipeline

\begin{table}[h]
\centering
\caption{MTDF CMB consistency validation. The MTDF framework achieves
$H_0 = 70.0\,\mathrm{km/s/Mpc}$ while maintaining CMB consistency through
early field energy that reduces the sound horizon by 0.74\%.}
\label{tab:cmb_summary}
\begin{tabular}{lcccc}
\hline\hline
Model & $H_0$ & $r_s(z_*)$ & $100\times\theta_s$ & $\chi^2_\mathrm{TT}$ \\
      & [km/s/Mpc] & [Mpc] & & (50 bins) \\
\hline
Planck 2018 baseline & 67.36 & 144.43 & 104.185 & 0.0 \\
$\Lambda$CDM + $H_0=70$ & 70.00 & 144.43 & 104.969 & 78.1 \\
\textbf{MTDF proxy} ($\Delta N_\mathrm{eff}=0.22$) & 70.00 & 143.36 & 104.195 & \textbf{24.2} \\
\hline\hline
\end{tabular}

\vspace{0.5em}
\footnotesize
\textit{Notes:} $\chi^2$ computed over $30 \leq \ell \leq 2000$ in 50 bins
with $\sigma \approx 2\%\,D_\ell$. The MTDF early field energy
($f_\mathrm{kick} \sim 0.03$) naturally produces $\Delta r_s/r_s = -0.74\%$,
equivalent to $\Delta N_\mathrm{eff} = 0.22$.
\end{table}

% Compact summary box for main text
\begin{tcolorbox}[colback=blue!5!white, colframe=blue!50!black,
                  title=\textbf{CMB Consistency Summary}]
\textbf{Problem:} Standard $\Lambda$CDM with $H_0 = 70$ fails CMB
($\chi^2 = 78.1$, angular scale shift $+0.75\%$).

\textbf{MTDF Solution:} Early field energy reduces sound horizon by 0.74\%,
restoring angular scale to Planck baseline.

\textbf{Validation:}
\begin{itemize}[nosep, leftmargin=*]
  \item Analytic MTDF: $f_\mathrm{kick} \sim 0.03 \Rightarrow
        \Delta N_\mathrm{eff} \approx 0.22$
  \item CLASS scan: Best-fit $\Delta N_\mathrm{eff} = 0.22$
        (matches prediction)
  \item Result: $\chi^2$ reduced from 78.1 to 24.2 (factor 3.2$\times$)
\end{itemize}
\end{tcolorbox}
